sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الصِّدْقُ مِنْ أَسْمَى الصِّفَاتِ الَّتِي حَثَّ عَلَيْهَا الإِسْلَامُ، لِمَا لَهُ مِنْ أَثَرٍ عَظِيمٍ فِي بِنَاءِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ وَاسْتِقَامَةِ الأَفْرَادِ.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost se smatra jednom od najuzvišenijih osobina na koje islam podstiče, zbog njenog velikog uticaja na izgradnju društva i ispravnost pojedinaca.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness is considered one of the loftiest qualities encouraged by Islam due to its great impact on building society and the rectitude of individuals.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: «عَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّدْقِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَإِنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْبِرِّ وَالصِّلَةِ وَالآدَابِ].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: 'Držite se istine, jer istina vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet.' [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o dobročinstvu, rodbinskim vezama i adabima].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Adhere to truthfulness, for truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise.' [Reported by Muslim in the Book of Virtue, Enjoining Good Manners, and Joining of the Ties of Kinship].

sentences.arabic: فَالصِّدْقُ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ قَوْلِ الْحَقِيقَةِ بِاللِّسَانِ، بَلْ هُوَ تَطَابُقُ الظَّاهِرِ مَعَ الْبَاطِنِ فِي جَمِيعِ الأَحْوَالِ.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost nije samo govorenje istine jezikom, već je to usklađenost onoga što je spolja sa onim što je unutra u svim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness is not merely speaking the truth with the tongue, but rather the alignment of the outward with the inward in all circumstances.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ أَوْضَحَ الْعُلَمَاءُ أَنَّ الْكَذِبَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْفُجُورِ، وَهُوَ طَرِيقٌ يُؤَدِّي بِصَاحِبِهِ إِلَى الْهَلَاكِ وَخُسْرَانِ الثِّقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Učenjaci su pojasnili da laž vodi u razvrat, a to je put koji vodi svog vlasnika u propast i gubitak povjerenja.
sentences.translationEn: Scholars have clarified that lying leads to wickedness, which is a path that leads its practitioner to destruction and the loss of trust.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَنْبَغِي لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَتَحَرَّى الصِّدْقَ فِي أَقْوَالِهِ وَأَفْعَالِهِ حَتَّى يُكْتَبَ عِنْدَ اللهِ صِدِّيقًا.
sentences.translation: Stoga vjernik treba da teži istini u svojim riječima i djelima kako bi kod Allaha bio upisan kao istinoljubiv.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, a believer should strive for truthfulness in their words and actions until they are recorded with Allah as a truthful person.
